title: Mannheim - Der Film
overview: Peter, Mike, and Enzo play together in a blues band after work. While Peter dreams of making it big as a musician, young writer Enzo searches in vain for true love, and Mike tries unsuccessfully to have children with his wife. The lives of the three guys are turned upside down when they meet the cosmopolitan, fun-loving, and attractive Turkish woman Aylin. Aylin studies at the Pop Academy and snatches a gig right out from under the guys' noses.
